extraction.one_line_summary: SKJELMOSE held yellow through superior second-half pacing in 25.6km Saint Gallen TT, while AYUSO won stage with negative splits taking 8s from EVENEPOEL
tactical_patterns: SKJELMOSE lost 24s at first check but exponentially improved second half, revealing negative-split TT preparation strategy.
AYUSO taking 8s from EVENEPOEL on technical descent finish shows climbing TTs suit him better than pure power courses.
EVENEPOEL dominated intermediate checks but faded final descent, suggesting he overcooked early effort defending slim 18s GC deficit.

rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: won TT from 46s down on GC by improving exponentially second half, passing riders on course
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: won stage in only second race of season, took 9s from Skjelmose and 8s from Evenepoel on hilly TT
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: dominated all intermediate checks but lost stage on final descent, couldn't convert 18s deficit despite early gains
rider_signals.GALL Felix: negative: lost 46s at first check as fourth on GC, confirms weakness against specialists in ITTs
